steps.title: Identify the subject of the relative clause
steps.content: The relative clause is “a document that ______ the basic freedoms.” The relative pronoun “that” is the subject of this clause, and it refers to “a document”—a singular noun.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule is subject-verb agreement: a verb must match its subject in number. Since “that” is singular, we need a singular verb. “Outlines” is the only singular form; “have outlined,” “were outlining,” and “outline” all use plural verb forms. That matches choice C — C is correct.
